title: pashat #6584
definition:
1) to strip, invade, strip off, make a dash, raid, spread out
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to strip off, put off
        1a2) to put off (one's shelter), make a dash
    1b) (Piel) to strip
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to strip of
        1c2) to strip off
        1c3) to flay
    1d) (Hithpael) to strip oneself of
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to strip off, put off
        1a2) to put off (one's shelter), make a dash
    1b) (Piel) to strip
    1c) (Hiphil)

        1c3) to flay
    1d) (Hithpael) to strip oneself of

    NASB:  to strip off, make a dash, raid
